# Transcript
AMM*
*E DIEDIKASAN
KATA TO TO DHMO
EPKRATHS DHM*
PYQODWROS PYQ 
SWSISTRATOS KHRY
KHRYKIWN SWSIST*
FILOKRATHS FILO
SMIKRWNIDHS ME 
ARISTANDROS LY
ONHTWR ONASANT
ARISOFWN NAYK
FEIDEKRATHS AR
KTHSWN FRYNO E
ROIKOS FILINO
MNHSISTRATOS F 
KALLIMACOS ME 
FILOSTRATOS M 
LYKWN GLAYKE
PRAOS XENOK
ADEISTOS P*
